title: Interactor

acc.description: This is the interactor accession (or identifier).

accURL.description: This represents the URL for given accession.

alias.description: This is the Gene name of the given accession.

evidencesURL.description: This represents the URL for the given interactions identifiers.

id.description: This is an auto increment counter which represents an unique number for the interaction.

score.description: This represents the confidence value (score) of an interaction.

description: List of Interactors that interacts with the given accession.
